'''shadasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scalma|scalma]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-d-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scalma|scalma]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shadasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shædæshæth|shædæshæth]] || [[word:shædæshæj|shædæshæj]] || [[word:shædæshæsh|shædæshæsh]] || [[word:shædæshæ|shædæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shadadashath|shadadashath]] || [[word:shadadashaj|shadadashaj]] || [[word:shadadashash|shadadashash]] || [[word:shadadasha|shadadasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shadashath|shadashath]] || [[word:shadashaj|shadashaj]] || [[word:shadashash|shadashash]] || [[word:shadasha|shadasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shadafshath|shadafshath]] || [[word:shadafshaj|shadafshaj]] || [[word:shadafshash|shadafshash]] || [[word:shadafshaf|shadafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shadashatha|shadashatha]] || [[word:shadashaja|shadashaja]] || [[word:shadashasha|shadashasha]] || [[word:shadashaka|shadashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shadashath|shadashath]] || [[word:shadashaj|shadashaj]] || [[word:shadashash|shadashash]] || [[word:shadasha|shadasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shadashathal|shadashathal]] || [[word:shadashajal|shadashajal]] || [[word:shadashashal|shadashashal]] || [[word:shadashakal|shadashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shadashathatha|shadashathatha]] || [[word:shadashajaja|shadashajaja]] || [[word:shadashashasha|shadashashasha]] || [[word:shadashaka|shadashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shadashathan|shadashathan]] || [[word:shadashajan|shadashajan]] || [[word:shadashashan|shadashashan]] || [[word:shadashakan|shadashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shadashathaoro|shadashathaoro]] || [[word:shadashajaoro|shadashajaoro]] || [[word:shadashashaoro|shadashashaoro]] || [[word:shadashakaoro|shadashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
